theme_strategy: Insane Next-Gen Cyber Aesthetics - Evolving the 'Purple & Black' concept into a deeply immersive, 'Electric Obsidian' mood. Think dark-mode Awwwards/Godly gaming sites with bento grids, cinematic reveals, and glowing glassmorphism.

typography.pairing_strategy: Editorial Future - Wide Display Sans for impactful headers mixed with Technical Geometric Mono/Sans for body and data.

layouts.hero: Cinematic full-viewport with massive typography overlay, floating 3D/abstract elements, and a subtle glowing gradient mesh behind a dark scrim. CTAs must pop with a neon trace border.
layouts.catalog_grid: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetric product cards. Instead of standard 4-col grids, mix large spotlight cards (col-span-2) with standard cards to create editorial tension.
layouts.product_page: Immersive split-screen or 2/3 - 1/3 layout. Massive sticky gallery on left, elegant scrolling product details/purchase box on right.
layouts.spacing: Hyper-generous. Use py-24 or py-32 for section transitions to allow components to breathe.

visual_enhancers.snow_particles: Evolve the 'snow' into 'Digital Ash' or 'Cyber Dust'. Use react-tsparticles but set color to #8A2BE2/#FFFFFF, opacity to 0.15, size to 1-2px, and move very slowly upwards or diagonally. Do not let it distract from text.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-2xl with extremely subtle borders (border-white/5) for the Navbar and floating menus to create 'Crystal Glass' effect.
visual_enhancers.gradients: No massive flat gradients. Use radial gradients as 'under-lighting' behind cards or text, keeping them strictly within 20% opacity.
visual_enhancers.marquees: Add a slow, kinetic text ribbon (e.g., 'NEW DROPS • PREMIUM SELLERS • INSTANT DELIVERY') across section breaks using large outline text (text-transparent stroke-white/20).

buttons.primary: Sharp edges or extremely pill-shaped (rounded-full). Deep purple background with a soft inner cyan glow on hover. Text must be bold/mono.
buttons.secondary: Glass button (bg-white/5) with 1px border. Hover state lifts and brightens background.

product_cards.style: Neumorphic Cyber. Flat dark background, 1px subtle border, glowing drop shadow on hover (shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(138,43,226,0.3)]).
product_cards.content: Image gets scale-105 on hover. Display discount % as a stark, high-contrast badge (e.g., bg-accent text-white). Include seller attribution in mono font.

components.navbar: Sticky, floating pill or edge-to-edge crystal glass. Ensure solid z-index. Must contain logo, main nav, user auth, and cart icon.

motion.scroll_reveals: Use Framer Motion. Elements should fade in and slide up slightly (y: 20) with spring physics as they enter the viewport.
motion.hover_states: Magnetic hover effect on primary CTAs if possible, otherwise scale up 1.02 with a duration of 0.3s ease-out.
motion.page_transitions: Instant and fluid. Avoid heavy page reload stutters.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme + Electric Obsidian palette. Do not inject default SaaS blue.
Apply fonts using Google Fonts imports for 'Unbounded' and 'Chivo'.

Ensure the hero section does not use heavy WebGL/3D out-of-the-box (per user previous rejection); use the provided high-res abstract neon image as a parallax background with floating Framer Motion text layers.
For the global particles (snow), use react-tsparticles but tune it to be subtle 'cyber dust' (low opacity, purple/white, slow movement) so it doesn't clutter the UI.
Build standard Shadcn components but override their CSS variables to match the border/glow rules defined here. Remove default border-radius from buttons if going for sharp edges.
Implement bento grid logic explicitly on the catalog and home page features sections using absolute positioning or CSS Grid (grid-cols-4, col-span utilities).
Use data-testid on every interactive element.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over gradients or particles maintains a 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Use text-shadow or a dark scrim (bg-black/40) over images.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all Framer Motion and tsparticles animations.
